text: fat is 0.2g. the fat quality is doing a lot of the work here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.
carbs is 18.1g. the carb side gets messy pretty quickly. for fruit, the real question is whether the sweetness stays under control.
protein is 0.7g. protein quality is a real strength here. for a fruit, the cleanest wins are low sugar and decent fibre.
vitamin c at 6% DV, vitamin a at 2% DV stand out most. that is barely moving the needle.
minerals are basically not part of the case here.

pros first. polyphenol case is stronger than the sugar suggests because tests whether fruit context can rescue sugary but still respected fruits. very easy to eat because highly practical fruit. hydrating and easy because practical plus.

the drawbacks next. sugar load is high for fruit because a real stress test for the fruit ruleset. fibre moderation is weak because much weaker than elite fruits. easy to overeat quickly because can rack up sugar fast.
C tier. Best only when the convenience or taste matters more than the nutrition return.
